# Ryoku shell IPC surface (target + functions).
# Generated by: ryoku-dev-audit-shell-binds --refresh. Do not hand-edit.
target overlay
  function toggle(): void

  function playPause(): void
  function list(): string
  function getActive(prop: string): string
  function stop(): void
  function previous(): void
  function play(): void
  function next(): void
  function pause(): void

  function unlock(): string

  function close(): void

  function enable(): void
  function disable(): void
  function isEnabled(): bool
